start.welcome:
👋 Welcome to the Polymarket trading bot, {name}!

Trade and manage your Polymarket positions right here in Telegram.
start.menu_prompt: What would you like to do?
start.help_text:
ℹ️ *Help*

*Getting started*
/start — open the main menu
/connect — connect a Polymarket wallet
/disconnect — remove a connected wallet

*Account & markets*
/portfolio — portfolio summary
/positions — open positions
/balance — USDC balance
/orders — open orders
/trades — recent trades
/activity — recent activity
/search <query> — find markets
/market <condition_id> — market details
/price <token_id> — current prices
/book <token_id> — order book

Your wallet credentials are encrypted and never shared. Use /cancel to abort any step.

create.instructions:
🆕 *Create a Polymarket account*

This bot does not create wallets for you. To get started:

1. Open Polymarket and sign up.
2. Fund your account with USDC on Polygon.
3. Come back here and tap *Connect Account* to link it.

👉 {url}

connect.choose_wallet_type:
🔗 *Connect your Polymarket wallet*

What kind of wallet are you using?
connect.bad_address: ⚠️ That doesn't look like a valid 0x address. Please try again.
connect.enter_funder: Send your *funder address* (the proxy/Safe address that holds your USDC).
connect.enter_private_key:
🔐 Now send your *private key*.

⚠️ I will *delete your message instantly* so it doesn't stay in the chat. Never share this key with anyone else. It is encrypted before being stored.
connect.key_deleted: 🔒 Key received and your message was deleted.
connect.key_delete_failed: ⚠️ I could not delete your message — please *delete it yourself now*.
connect.bad_key: ⚠️ That doesn't look like a valid private key. Please send it again (64 hex characters).
connect.validating: ⏳ Validating your wallet and deriving API credentials…
connect.mismatch: ❌ This private key does not control the wallet address you gave. Please check and try again.
connect.validation_failed: ❌ Could not validate the wallet. Please check your key and try again.
connect.success:
✅ *Connected!*

Wallet: `{wallet}`
USDC balance: ${balance}

You can now view positions and trade.
connect.timeout: ⌛ Connection timed out. Nothing was saved — start again with /connect.

disconnect.confirm: Disconnect wallet `{wallet}`? Your stored key will be permanently deleted.
disconnect.done: ✅ Disconnected. Your stored credentials were deleted.
disconnect.none: You have no connected account to disconnect.
disconnect.choose: Which wallet do you want to disconnect?

account.none: You haven't connected an account yet. Tap *Connect Account* or use /connect.

confirm.cancel_all: ⚠️ Confirm *CANCEL ALL* open orders? This cannot be undone.
confirm.expired: ⌛ This confirmation expired. Please run the command again.

order.failed: ❌ Order failed. Please try again or adjust your parameters.

error.no_account: ⚠️ Connect a Polymarket account first ( /connect ) to do that.
error.trading_unavailable: ⚠️ Trading isn't available for this account. Reconnect with a valid private key.
error.suspended: 🚫 Your access is suspended. Please contact support.
error.rate_limited: ⏳ Too many requests — please slow down.
error.generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again.
